rulings.Case Title: MAX LIMITED, LLC, A CA. LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY VS. CRITICAL PATH, INC., A CA. CORP et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER
rulings.Rulings: SUSTAIN demurrers to Third, Fifth, and Sixth causes of action with leave to amend to allege conduct with specificity. OVERRULE demurrers to 4th and 7th cause of action, economic loss doctrine does not apply here. OVERRULE demurrer to specific items in the prayer as procedurally improper. ON ITS OWN MOTION, the court STRIKES ?13 of prayer seeking Treble Damages because no damages are allowed in private suit to enforce 17200. See Cel-Tech Communications, Inc. v. Los Angeles Cellular Telephone Co. (1999, 20 Cal.4th 163. (CW)

rulings.Case Title: MAX LIMITED, LLC, A CA. LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY VS. CRITICAL PATH, INC., A CA. CORP et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION Notice Of Special Motion To Strike And Motion To Strike Plaintiff'S Complaint And Each Cause Of Action Therein
rulings.Rulings: GRANT special motion to strike the 2nd c/a for breach of implied covenant of good faith and fair dealing; and the 8th c/a for Violation of B&P?17200 based on petitioning the zoning administrator. Claims barred by Civil?47(b)(3) privilege. DENY special motion to strike first, third, fourth, fifth, sixth, and seventh causes of action. The court finds that these are not SLAPP claims. GRANT Defendants' attorney fees and costs. Defendant to file a memorandum of costs. DENY Plaintiff's request for costs, because this motion is not frivolous. (CW)
